business.name: One Hour Heating & Air Conditioning® of Chattanooga
business.tagline: Fast HVAC repairs when you need them most

hero.headline: One Hour *Promise* — Your System Fixed Fast
hero.subheadline: When your AC dies in July or your heat quits in January, we're already on our way. That's the One Hour guarantee.

services_section.label: THE FIX
services_section.heading: Every System, Every Problem
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full replacements — we handle it all in one hour or less

services.title: Emergency AC Repair
services.description: System down? We're rolling within the hour. No waiting around when Tennessee heat hits.

services.title: Heating System Service
services.description: Furnace acting up? Heat pump struggling? We diagnose and fix it fast — before you freeze.

services.title: HVAC Installation
services.description: New construction or full system replacement. Professional installation that works right the first time.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance
services.description: Keep your system running smooth with regular tune-ups. Catch problems before they become emergencies.

about.heading: The One Hour Difference in Chattanooga
about.body: One Hour Heating & Air Conditioning® brings fast, reliable HVAC service to Chattanooga and surrounding areas. Our technicians arrive within one hour of your call, equipped to handle any heating or cooling emergency. No excuses, no delays — just the service you need when you need it most.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Chattanooga
service_areas.subheading: One hour service promise extends throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready for the One Hour Promise?
cta.body: Don't wait around for HVAC service. Get a technician to your door within one hour — guaranteed. Call now for immediate response.
